changelog: 1.0 (2026-06-06): System task graph stitched over the pre-built backend-api container (gold reference output for the cross-file-stitch eval).

overview: System-level task graph for tinytrack, stitched over the already-built backend-api container subgraph: the repo scaffold, the cross-container system test tasks (each depending cross-file on the backend-api tasks it exercises), the build_order, and the per-container subgraph registry.

tasks.title: Scaffold the monorepo workspace
tasks.description: Workspace skeleton, shared tooling, root manifests and CI pipeline that every container scaffold depends on.
acceptance: CI runs lint + test on a pull request

tasks.title: System e2e: create and triage a task
tasks.description: Realize the system e2e test TST-001 driving WKF-001 across the web app and the backend API. Depends cross-file on the already-built backend-api tasks controller.
acceptance: the e2e suite realizing TST-001 passes against a seeded stack

tasks.title: System e2e: comment on a task and close it
tasks.description: Realize the system e2e test TST-002 driving WKF-002 across the web app and the backend API. Depends cross-file on the backend-api comments controller.
acceptance: the e2e suite realizing TST-002 passes

tasks.title: System e2e: configure the weekly digest and review runs
tasks.description: Realize the system e2e test TST-003 driving WKF-003 across the web app, backend API and digest worker. Depends cross-file on the backend-api digest-settings controller.
acceptance: the e2e suite realizing TST-003 records a DigestRun visible in the UI

tasks.title: Tasks API response contract test
tasks.description: Realize the contract test TST-004 pinning the tasks resource response shape the web app depends on. Depends cross-file on the backend-api tasks controller.
acceptance: the tasks endpoints conform to the published API__tasks contract

tasks.title: Task-list latency load test
tasks.description: Realize the load test TST-005 verifying the p95 task-list latency NFR. Depends cross-file on the backend-api tasks controller.
acceptance: p95 task-list load stays within the NFR budget under target load

tasks.title: Deploy-prep handoff for the stitched system
tasks.description: Assemble the release manifest once every buildable container subgraph is complete; hands off to /sdlc:deploy. Depends cross-file on the backend-api scaffold being in place.
acceptance: the manifest references every buildable container's build artifact

task_warnings: WRN-001: the backend-api->identity-provider edge is exercised inside the backend-api container's auth-middleware security tests; no separate system integration task is warranted.
